review_title: Shogun helps me build sites faster with great results and conversions!
description: Shogun has become my go to tool to speed up my processes in building great looking pages. The publishing and autosave have helped save me from losing work.
author: Ryan B.
pros: Shogun is easy to visually layout and modify landing pages and web pages. I have used this extensively with clients sites and have great results! The tools to manage SEO and Meta data are great. Page speeds are very fast!
cons: Some of the paragraph text editing features are lacking but you can easily work around these.

review_title: Incredible Customer Service and Make Your Dreams Come True Self Web Design!
description: What I love the most is that I've had a steep learning curve to figure out how to use Shogun BUT the customer service is absolutely one of the best around. Hands down!!! These guys get back to you blazing fast and ALWAYS ALWAYS ALWAYS do their best to help. No more waiting for days for shitty customer service or for your web developer to take their sweet time getting back to you. These guys have impressed me with the like 40 times I've had to get in touch with them now in the last two weeks. AMAZING. I give them virtual hugs every time they help. I love this amazing fast customer service.
author: Jade D.
pros: I absolutely love the flexibility of creating your OWN website pages from scratch!! You're no longer at the mercy of expensive web designers and waiting endlessly for them to help. No more of that nonsense. Shogun lets you be as creative as possible and I just created a main page that no other designer has been able to do for me effortlessly. Im so incredibly happy!!!!
cons: It's a little glitchy. I find I have to click on things a lot for them to work and things disappear and need to redo things sometimes when Im working on a page. I've no idea why. Sometimes while my page is loading I see things appear only briefly that should be hidden. Im hoping these are things they can resolve easily for flawless page rendering.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Good tool for marketing teams that need to move fast without relying on dev. For ecommerce brands running regular campaigns and needing custom landing pages on a tight timeline, it earns its place in the stack. Not perfect, but it removes a real bottleneck.
author: Darren Y.
pros: The drag and drop editor is genuinely easy to use and doesn't require dev support for most page builds. Templates are solid starting points and customizing them is fast. Being able to build and publish landing pages without pulling engineering resources is the main value prop and it delivers on that. Works well for campaign pages, collection edits, and quick seasonal updates.
cons: Performance can be a concern depending on how heavy your pages get. The editor can feel slow at times and occasionally glitchy when working with more complex layouts. Some features that should be standard require higher tier plans. Not the cheapest tool for what it is.

description: Love it so far! It is really scalable! It has been great so far.
author: Keilara M.
pros: The user friendly aspect and functionality as well as customization abilities
cons: I can’t seem to pin in my Shopify apps.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Showgun supports soars to resolve integration issue.
description: Overall, I am very happy with the Showgun APP. I enjoy building the pages for my store in a professional way and I feel Showgun supplies that. I love the overall feel and design of the platform.
author: Sean B.
pros: The Support was fabulous. [sensitive content hidden] was awesome, he listed detailed steps to help me resolve my issue. I definitely learned something and I can't thank [sensitive content hidden] at Showgun support enough for all his assistance.
cons: I'm enjoying Showgun. The integration process with Shopify is important and I wish there were more tutorials out there about the integration.

review_title: As easy as drag and drop!
description: Made creating fillable forms & additional landing pages for our site so simple.
author: Shannon S.
pros: Great product for non web developers. Easy editing to make it what you want.
cons: If your site is highly customized already before using shogun some design previews are not portrayed properly.

description: Overall, my experience with Shogun has been fantastic! It’s helped us elevate our site’s design, and the customer support has always been prompt and helpful whenever I needed assistance. It’s made running my business online so much easier!
author: Alia E.
pros: What I love most about Shogun is its flexibility. You can fully customize your site without needing to be a coding expert. The drag-and-drop builder makes it so easy to design stunning pages, and the templates are a huge time-saver.
cons: If I had to pick something, I’d say the pricing could be a bit more accessible for smaller businesses. But honestly, for the value it offers, it’s worth every penny.

author: Jean-Christophe R.
pros: Their customer service. Both fast and accurate.
cons: We had 1 bug. A modification we did not do was published.

description: Amazing! I refer Shogun to anyone that has a Shopify website.
author: Trisha S.
pros: The ability to create new engaging, seo optimized landing pages within minutes. And another HUGE pro is the team! They are outstanding.
cons: Petty, but the carousel module. I would love to see a more modern style.

description: It's good, we don't create complicated web pages, so the features they offer are more than enough for us.
author: Tomo S.
pros: I like their customer support team, they always help us fix problems efficiently
cons: When editing the page, there's a time lag that makes it difficult to move or edit elements quickly. I'm not sure if it's due to my PC or slow internet connection.

review_title: Shogun - Great product and customer Support!
description: Shogun is a reat tool for brands looking to launch and manage content in house! They have a strong support team that is available to help with any ask, whether is updating content, access or just general support.
author: Shada S.
pros: Their customer support was great! quick to reply and help solve this issue.
cons: UI is bit difficult to get accustomed to.

description: Having used Shogun for just under 4 years, the team and I have found the CMS platform easy to work with, responsive and with the bonus of great support from the Shogun Team when needed.
author: Nash V.
pros: The team and I like Shogun as it connects well with our platform, the ability to link to product and build content with ease is great. The Support from the Shogun Team is fast and informative.
cons: Not being able to support Multi Store Front.
author_profession: Digital Platform Marketing and Operations Manager

review_title: Easy to use page builder for Shopify
description: Overall I am very pleased with the features and the look and feel of the software. Happy to recommend to anyone looking for an easy but professional way to build extra Shopify pages.
author: Robin J.
pros: They layout of the dashboard makes it simple to see all the tools at your fingertips. The option to easily set up variants of pages is a usual feature as well.
cons: Sometimes the tinymice editor disappears when you click on a element or it can cover some of the content.

description: I've been using Shogun since it's early days, and for nearly the entirety of that time, Andre has been my point of contact for the platform. He's quick to reply and if he doesn't have the answer he will connect me with a colleague or team to help! For full disclosure our workplace is grandfathered in with a cheaper plan. Many of the new features Shogun offers are already handled by systems more integral to our business, so there's not much sense in upsetting that balance.
author: Liam Styles C.
pros: With Shogun, you can make some nice landing pages for products and services without coding knowledge, though you'll be limited by that factor as well.
cons: There are only a few cons to this service - and I can only speak to my experience with the app (read our overall experience for more info) which will be different from anyone signing up nowadays. The first one is price, especially if you are already running a robust system for marketing and metrics and don't require all the extra bells and whistles Shogun offers. The second is that there is no menu memory in the page editor - if I switch between elements I'm editing, the menu brings me back to it's top instead of remembering that I was looking at a lower part of the menu. Smaller gripe, but definitely slows down productivity.

review_title: Using with Shopify for Landing Pages
description: We use Shogun for our home page and landing pages as it's relatively easy and quick with its no-code functionality. There are some limitations to using with Shopify for ecommerce, primarily the limited use of the add to cart buttons because Shogun doesn't hide out of stock variants.
author: Morga C.
pros: Easy to create and update page templates, support is always responsive and helpful.
cons: We're unable to use Shogun's ATC features because of out of stock variants being shown

description: My overall experience has been quite positive. The quick and friendly support provided made it very easy to understand and enjoyable to work with. Initially, the only trouble for me was the change of the design. However, with time, I got used to it.
author: Simon L.
pros: Quick and friendly support. It is easy to understand and enjoyable to work with!
cons: The only trouble for me was the change of the design. However, with time, I got used to it.

description: Great so far, allows us to build dedicated ppc landing pages quickly and on brand.
author: Adam A.
pros: How it integrates directly with Shopify, allowing me to build on brand landing pages for our ppc campaigns using the theme's fonts.
cons: Building your first page take a bit of time, getting used to the features. Having used unbounce in previous projects, shogun is a different, but still very good.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Shogun is an easy platform to use and integrates well with Big Commerce. Customer support team is friendly and responsive.
author: Chontelle S.
pros: - ease of use - suitable for novices who know very little about web design - easy to install with Big Commerce - support team - I dealt with Sweetan and he was very helpful. I left work at 5pm and when i came in the next day it was all sorted :)
cons: - very glitchy if you have autosave on - no preview option
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Natalie N.
pros: [sensitive content hidden] was great in helping with my understanding of the design process. He was able to pinpoint exactly what my problem was. Customer service was great!
cons: No real cons, I think it would be great if the design portion was more flexible between the mobile and desktop versions.

review_title: thanks [sensitive content hidden] for helping me
author: Djeziri S.
pros: intuitive, professional product page creation
cons: well i'm still a beginner with this app but for me it's just the price
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great App for what we needed.
description: Used for years and never had any issues with the app.
author: Paige B.
pros: The ease of creating pages for anything I needed. Drag and Drop WYSIWYG!
cons: Having to format for each device. It was doable, but keeping things organized was a little tricky.

description: Excellent experience overall, It is very flexible and easy to manage
author: Ana María G.
pros: Easiness to manage and Customer Service was fast and precise
cons: Sometimes its a bit difficult to fit and frame images correctly, requires trial & error

description: Great. Easy to use. Insanely good support.
author: Martin K.
pros: Love how this increases the design capabilities
cons: Not super clear sometimes on where to find certain elements. Otherwise it's great, support can help with that.

review_title: Shogun is an excellent addition to a CMS
description: My experience with Shogun has been wonderful. Its an excellent tool that I honestly don't use enough and it has so many amazing features.
author: Matthew K.
pros: The ease of using Shogun Page Builder is hard to beat. A big improvement for making custom pages compared to most CMS html editors that come standard.
cons: No Cons that I can think of at this time.

author: Kathryn T.
pros: We've been using Shogun for several years now to build and manage the 'static' pages of our website (non-ecommerce pages). The builder is intuitive and easy to understand and use. We've had minimal issues but when we have the support team has been great in getting them resolved. Recently [sensitive content hidden] helped us resolve an error with a page that wouldn't publish due to a URL issue by logging into our ecommerce intergration and identifying the problem for us.
cons: No immediate cons come to mind - it serves our needs well.
